chapter_title.ar: بَابُ ذَمِّ الدُّنْيَا وَ الزُّهْدِ فِيهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 61 – Condemning the world and (adopting) the ascetism in it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (274/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (274/ 8)
text: خَرَجَ النَّبِيُّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ هُوَ مَحْزُونٌ فَأَتَاهُ مَلَكٌ وَ مَعَهُ مَفَاتِيحُ خَزَائِنِ الْأَرْضِ فَقَالَ يَا مُحَمَّدُ هَذِهِ مَفَاتِيحُ خَزَائِنِ الْأَرْضِ يَقُولُ لَكَ رَبُّكَ افْتَحْ وَ خُذْ مِنْهَا مَا شِئْتَ مِنْ غَيْرِ أَنْ تُنْقَصَ شَيْئاً عِنْدِي

فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) الدُّنْيَا دَارُ مَنْ لَا دَارَ لَهُ وَ لَهَا يَجْمَعُ مَنْ لَا عَقْلَ لَهُ فَقَالَ الْمَلِكُ وَ الَّذِي بَعَثَكَ بِالْحَقِّ نَبِيّاً لَقَدْ سَمِعْتُ هَذَا الْكَلَامَ مِنْ مَلَكٍ يَقُولُهُ فِي السَّمَاءِ الرَّابِعَةِ حِينَ أُعْطِيتُ الْمَفَاتِيحَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Al Qasim Bin Yahya, from his grandfather Al Hassan Bin Rashid, from Abdullah Bin Sinan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> who said: ‘The Prophet<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> came out and he<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> was in grief. So an Angel came over to him<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup>, and with him were keys to the treasures of the earth, and he said: ‘O Muhammad<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup>! These are keys to the treasures of the earth. Your<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> Lord<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> is Saying to you<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> “Open and take from it whatever you<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> so desire to from without there being a reduction of anything in My Presence”’.

So Rasool-Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> said: ‘The world is a house for the one what has no house for him, and for it there is a collection for the one who has no intellect for him’. So the Angel said: ‘By the One<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Who Sent you<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> with the Truth as a Prophet<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup>, I had heard this speech from an Angel saying it in the fourth sky, when I was given the keys’’.
en.sarwar: 8. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid from al-Qasim ibn Yahya from his grandfather al-Hassan ibn Rashid from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Once, the Holy Prophet came out very depressed. An angel came to him with the key to the treasures of the earth and said, ‘O Muhammad, these are the keys to the treasures of the earth and your Lord says, “Open these treasures and take whatever you want. It will not cause any reduction in your reward with Me.” The Messenger of Allah then said, ‘This world is home for the homeless. Only those who have no power of reason accumulate for this world.’ The angel then said, ‘I swear by the One Who has sent you with truth as a prophet that I heard what you just said from an angel saying it in the fourth heaven at the time these keys were given to me.’”
